<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create Session"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/sessions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create new session.

v1.0.0 security fix: requires ``sessions.write`` scope (was:
``sessions.read`` — REST semantics violation). Creating a session
is a mutation, not a read.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
